enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update about the previous day: working outside on videos and his website, visiting his mother and brother for a barbecue, and watching part of a Bible series on Netflix. He mentions his plan for the current day includes working in a nearby town and finishing a webpage.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was outside and I worked.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was making videos and got caught up on request videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did some work on my website throughout the day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had a barbecue with my brother and my mother for a couple of hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I saw some of the Bible while at my mother's place.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mother has Netflix, and I think I want to go back there to watch more of it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I enjoy watching historical shows like Elizabeth on Netflix.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I will go to work in the next town over, Beryl.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I’m trying to finish a page and will continue working on it today.

transcript.text: Living in Boulder with Kyle Pounds. I'm keeping up with the daily vlogs again. Yay.
Yesterday I was outside and I worked. I was making videos, got caught up on request videos,
And then I did some work on my website throughout the day, and my mother called me and went over
There and had a barbecue with my brother and my mother for a couple hours, and I saw some of the
Bible, the miniseries, because she has Netflix. So I think I want to go back there and watch some
More of that. That's cool. And some other cool shows, historical shows, Elizabeth. Anyways,
So I go to work in the next town over today, and in Beryl, and then I'm going to go back.
I'm going to try and finish this page I'm working on, and then that's what I'll do today.
That's all I can think of. That's living in Boulder with me. Peace out.
